```{r plotting, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
    mean_PRE_to_MID = mean(PRE_to_MID),
    sd_PRE_to_MID = sd(PRE_to_MID),
    mean_MID_to_POST = mean(MID_to_POST),
    sd_MID_to_POST = sd(MID_to_POST),
    mean_PRE_to_POST = mean(PRE_to_POST),
    sd_PRE_to_POST = sd(PRE_to_POST)
  )
# Subset rows with "1RM" in the Measure column and retain TrainingStatus
measures_1RM <- summary_data %>%
  filter(str_detect(Measure, "1RM"))
# Create a new column for asterisks
measures_1RM$Asterisk <- ifelse(
  (measures_1RM$Exercise == "Bench Press" & measures_1RM$TrainingStatus == "trained") |
  (measures_1RM$Exercise == "Deadlift" & measures_1RM$TrainingStatus == "untrained") |
  (measures_1RM$Exercise == "Lat Pull") |  # Both trained and untrained significant
  (measures_1RM$Exercise == "Leg Press" & measures_1RM$TrainingStatus == "trained") |
  (measures_1RM$Exercise == "OHP") |  # Both trained and untrained significant
  (measures_1RM$Exercise == "Seated Row" & measures_1RM$TrainingStatus == "trained"),
  "*", ""
)
# Reorder the factor levels for the 'TrainingStatus' column
measures_1RM$TrainingStatus <- factor(measures_1RM$TrainingStatus, levels = c("untrained", "trained"))

# Reorder factor levels for Exercise variable
exercise_order <- c("Leg Press", "Deadlift", "Seated Row", "Lat Pull", "Bench Press", "OHP")
measures_1RM$Exercise <- factor(measures_1RM$Exercise, levels = exercise_order)

# Plot with markers for significant differences
plot_1RM_with_asterisks <- ggplot(measures_1RM, aes(x = Exercise, y = mean_PRE_to_POST, fill = TrainingStatus)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_PRE_to_POST - sd_PRE_to_POST, ymax = mean_PRE_to_POST + sd_PRE_to_POST),
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), width = 0.2) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), width = 0.9) +
  geom_text(aes(y = mean_PRE_to_POST + sd_PRE_to_POST + 2, label = Asterisk), size = 8, color = "black",
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  labs(x = "", y = "1RM %Δ", fill = "Training Status") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(dark_blue_color, light_blue_color)) +  # Apply custom fill colors
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 130),
                     breaks = seq(0, 120, 20),
                     minor_breaks = seq(0, 120, 10),
                     expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme_pubr() +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = c(0.85, 0.8),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        text = element_text(size = 10),          # Set font size for general text
        axis.title = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),    # Set font size for axis titles
        axis.text = element_text(size = 6, color = "black"),     # Set font size for axis text
        legend.title = element_text(size = 8),  # Set font size for legend title
        legend.text = element_text(size = 8),   # Set font size for legend text))
        legend.key.size = unit(0.3, "cm") )         # Smaller legend keys/symbols

plot_1RM_with_asterisks

# Subset rows with "10RM" in the Measure column and retain TrainingStatus
measures_10RM <- summary_data %>%
  filter(str_detect(Measure, "10RM")) %>%
  mutate(Measure = str_replace(Measure, "_10RM", "")) # Remove "_10RM" suffix
# Reorder the factor levels for the 'TrainingStatus' column
measures_10RM$TrainingStatus <- factor(measures_1RM$TrainingStatus, levels = c("untrained", "trained"))

# Create a new column for asterisks
measures_10RM$Asterisk <- ifelse(
 (measures_10RM$Exercise == "Bench Press" & measures_10RM$TrainingStatus == "trained") |     # p=0.004
 (measures_10RM$Exercise == "Deadlift") |  # Both trained (0.049) and untrained (0.030) significant
 (measures_10RM$Exercise == "Lat Pull") |  # Both trained (0.034) and untrained (0.037) significant
 (measures_10RM$Exercise == "Leg Press") | # Both trained (0.000) and untrained (0.009) significant
 (measures_10RM$Exercise == "OHP") |       # Both trained (0.040) and untrained (0.011) significant
 (measures_10RM$Exercise == "Seated Row" & measures_10RM$TrainingStatus == "trained"),      # p=0.020
 "*", ""
)
# Reorder factor levels for Exercise variable
exercise_order <- c("Leg Press", "Deadlift", "Seated Row", "Lat Pull", "Bench Press",  "OHP")
measures_10RM$Exercise <- factor(measures_10RM$Exercise, levels = exercise_order)

# Plot with markers for significant differences
plot_10RM_with_asterisks <- ggplot(measures_10RM, aes(x = Exercise, y = mean_PRE_to_POST, fill = TrainingStatus)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_PRE_to_POST - sd_PRE_to_POST, ymax = mean_PRE_to_POST + sd_PRE_to_POST),
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), width = 0.2) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), width = 0.9) +
  geom_text(aes(y = mean_PRE_to_POST + sd_PRE_to_POST + 2, label = Asterisk), size = 8, color = "black",
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  labs(x = "", y = "10RM %Δ", fill = "Training Status") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(dark_blue_color, light_blue_color)) +  # Apply custom fill colors
  theme_pubr() +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 130),
                     breaks = seq(0, 120, 20),
                     minor_breaks = seq(0, 120, 10),
                     expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = c(0.85, 0.8),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        text = element_text(size = 10),          # Set font size for general text
        axis.title = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),    # Set font size for axis titles
        axis.text = element_text(size = 6, color = "black"),     # Set font size for axis text
        legend.title = element_text(size = 8),  # Set font size for legend title
        legend.text = element_text(size = 8),   # Set font size for legend text))
        legend.key.size = unit(0.3, "cm") )         # Smaller legend keys/symbols
plot_10RM_with_asterisks
```

![10RM Plot](02212024_output/02212024_SIG_10RM_plot_TvsU.png)
![1RM Plot ](02212024_output/02212024_SIG_1RM_plot_TvsU.png)
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Combine all 4 plots using ggarrange 
combined_strength_plots <- ggarrange(
  rm1splot, rm10splot,
  plot_1RM_with_asterisks, plot_10RM_with_asterisks,
  ncol = 2, nrow = 2,
  labels = c("a", "b", "c", "d"),
  common.legend = FALSE  # Keep individual legends since they're different
)
# Save the combined plot
file_name_plot <- paste0(output_directory, "/", date, "_combined_strength_plots.png")
ggsave(file_name_plot, plot = combined_strength_plots, width = 6.5, height = 5, dpi = 300)

combined_strength_plots
```


```{r Plot 1RM and 10RM faceted by TrainingStatus, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Read in the Excel file and perform all transformations in a single pipeline
mydata <- read_excel("MRP.xlsx", sheet = "Strength", col_names = TRUE) %>%
 dplyr::select(1:3, 7:9) %>%
  rename(Subject = 1, Measure = 2, Exercise = 3, PRE = 4, MID = 5, POST = 6) %>%
  filter(!(Subject %in% c("SUB 5", "SUB 13"))) %>%
  mutate(
    PRE = as.numeric(PRE),
    MID = as.numeric(MID),
    POST = as.numeric(POST)
  )
# Apply the replacements to the Exercise column
mydata$Exercise <- dplyr::recode(mydata$Exercise, !!!replacements)

# Add a new column "TrainingStatus" based on the subjects
mydata <- mydata %>%
  mutate(TrainingStatus = ifelse(Subject %in% trained_subjects, "trained", "untrained"))
# Remove BentRow entries from mydata
mydata <- mydata[mydata$Measure != "BentRow_1RM" & mydata$Measure != "BentRow_10RM", ]
mydata <- mydata %>%
  filter(Exercise != "Bent Row")

#Filter 10rm and 1rm to new tables
# Function to summarize and reshape the data
summarize_and_reshape <- function(data) {
  summary <- data %>%
    group_by(Exercise) %>%
    summarise(across(
      c(PRE, MID, POST),
      list(Mean = mean, SD = sd),
      .names = "{.col}_{.fn}")
    )
  summary_long <- summary %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = c(PRE_Mean:POST_SD),
      names_to = c("Time", ".value"),
      names_pattern = "(PRE|MID|POST)_(.*)"
    ) %>%
    mutate(Exercise = reorder(Exercise, -Mean),
           Time = factor(Time, levels = c("PRE", "MID", "POST")))
  return(summary_long)
}
# Filter 10rm and 1rm to new tables and apply the function
mydata_1rm_T <- mydata %>% filter(Measure == "1RM" & TrainingStatus == "trained") %>% summarize_and_reshape()
mydata_1rm_U <- mydata %>% filter(Measure == "1RM" & TrainingStatus == "untrained") %>% summarize_and_reshape()
mydata_10rm_T <- mydata %>% filter(Measure == "10RM" & TrainingStatus == "trained") %>% summarize_and_reshape()
mydata_10rm_U <- mydata %>% filter(Measure == "10RM" & TrainingStatus == "untrained") %>% summarize_and_reshape()

# create a vector indicating which bars are significantly different
sig_diff_1rm_T <- c(F,F,T,F,T,T,F,T,T,F,T,T,F,F,F,F,T,T)
#(BP, DL, LAT, LP ,OHP,SR)
# plot with markers for significant differences
rm1_T_plot <-
  ggplot(mydata_1rm_T, aes(x = Exercise, y = Mean, fill = Time)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = Mean - SD, ymax = Mean + SD),
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), width = 0.2) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), width = 0.9) +
  geom_text(aes(y = Mean + SD + 2, label =ifelse(sig_diff_1rm_T, "*", "")),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), size = 10) +
  labs(x = "Trained", y = "1RM (kg)", fill = "Time") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(dark_blue_color, light_blue_color, third_color)) +

  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 165),
                     breaks = seq(0, 160, 20),
                     minor_breaks = seq(0, 160, 10),
                     expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme_pubr() +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = c(0.85, 0.8),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
        panel.border = element_blank())

# Save the plot to a png file at 1200 dpi
file_name_plot <- paste0(output_directory, "/", date, "1rm_T_plot_sig.png")
ggsave(file_name_plot, plot = rm1_T_plot, width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 1200)

sig_diff_1rm_U <- c(F,T,T,F,T,T,F,T,T,F,F,T,F,F,T,F,F,F)
#(BP, DL, LAT, LP ,OHP,SR)
rm1_U_plot<-
ggplot(mydata_1rm_U, aes(x = Exercise, y = Mean, fill = Time)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = Mean - SD, ymax = Mean + SD),
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), width = 0.2) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), width = 0.9) +
  geom_text(aes(y = Mean + SD + 2, label = ifelse(sig_diff_1rm_U, "*", "")),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), size = 10) +
  labs(x = "Untrained", y = "1RM (kg)", fill = "Time") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(dark_blue_color, light_blue_color, third_color)) +

  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 165),
                     breaks = seq(0, 160, 20),
                     minor_breaks = seq(0, 160, 10),
                     expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme_pubr() +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = c(0.85, 0.8),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
        panel.border = element_blank())

file_name_plot <- paste0(output_directory, "/", date, "1rm_U_plot_sig.png")
ggsave(file_name_plot, plot = rm1_U_plot, width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 1200)

# Combine the plots using plot_grid and include labels
combined_plot <- plot_grid(rm1_U_plot, rm1_T_plot, nrow = 1)
print(combined_plot)

file_name_plot <- paste0(output_directory, "/", date, "1rm_TvsU_plot_sig.png")
ggsave(file_name_plot, plot = combined_plot, width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 1200)

# Reorder factor levels for Exercise variable
exercise_order <- c("Leg Press", "Deadlift", "Seated Row", "Lat Pull", "Bench Press",  "OHP")
mydata_10rm_T$Exercise <- factor(mydata_10rm_T$Exercise, levels = exercise_order)
# create a vector indicating which bars are significantly different
sig_diff_10rm_T <- c(F,F,F,F,T,T,F,F,T,F,T,T,F,F,T,F,T,T)
#(BP, DL, LAT, LP ,OHP,SR)
# plot with markers for significant differences
rm10_T_plot <-
  ggplot(mydata_10rm_T, aes(x = Exercise, y = Mean, fill = Time)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = Mean - SD, ymax = Mean + SD),
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), width = 0.2) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), width = 0.9) +
  geom_text(aes(y = Mean + SD + 2, label =ifelse(sig_diff_10rm_T, "*", "")),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), size = 10) +
  labs(x = "Trained", y = "10RM (kg)", fill = "Time") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(dark_blue_color, light_blue_color, third_color)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 165),
                     breaks = seq(0, 160, 20),
                     minor_breaks = seq(0, 160, 10),
                     expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme_pubr() +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = c(0.85, 0.8),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
        panel.border = element_blank())
# Save the plot to a png file at 1200 dpi
file_name_plot <- paste0(output_directory, "/", date, "10rm_T_plot_sig.png")
ggsave(file_name_plot, plot = rm10_T_plot, width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 1200)

sig_diff_10rm_U <- c(F,T,T,F,T,T,F,T,T,F,T,T,F,F,T,F,T,T)
#(BP, DL, LAT, LP ,OHP,SR)
rm10_U_plot<-
  ggplot(mydata_10rm_U, aes(x = Exercise, y = Mean, fill = Time)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = Mean - SD, ymax = Mean + SD),
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), width = 0.2) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), width = 0.9) +
  geom_text(aes(y = Mean + SD + 2, label = ifelse(sig_diff_10rm_U, "*", "")),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), size = 10) +
  labs(x = "Untrained", y = "10RM (kg)", fill = "Time") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(dark_blue_color, light_blue_color, third_color)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 165),
                     breaks = seq(0, 160, 20),
                     minor_breaks = seq(0, 160, 10),
                     expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme_pubr() +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = c(0.85, 0.8),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
        panel.border = element_blank())

file_name_plot <- paste0(output_directory, "/", date, "10rm_U_plot_sig.png")
ggsave(file_name_plot, plot = rm10_U_plot, width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 300)

# Combine the plots using plot_grid and include labels
combined_plot <- plot_grid(rm10_U_plot, rm10_T_plot, nrow = 1)

# Display the combined plot
print(combined_plot)
file_name_plot <- paste0(output_directory, "/", date, "10rm_TvsU_plot_sig.png")
ggsave(file_name_plot, plot = combined_plot, width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 300)
```

# VO2 and other variables

```{r VO2 and other variables plot, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# read in the data from the Excel file
mydata <- read_excel("MRP.xlsx", sheet = "vo2data", col_names = TRUE)

# Add a new column "TrainingStatus" based on the subjects
mydata <- mydata %>%
  mutate(TrainingStatus = ifelse(Subject %in% trained_subjects, "trained", "untrained"))

# Create a list of measures
measures <- c("VO2Max", "VO2Peak", "Body fat (%)", "Weight (Kg)", "Vertical Jump","6.5km*hr-1", "16km*hr-1",
              "12km*hr-1", "Wmax")

mydata_T <- mydata %>%
  filter(TrainingStatus == "trained") %>%
  select(Subject, Measure, PRE, MID, POST) %>%
  filter(Measure %in% measures)

mydata_U <- mydata %>%
  filter(TrainingStatus == "untrained") %>%
  select(Subject, Measure, PRE, MID, POST) %>%
  filter(Measure %in% measures)

# # Pivot the data into long format
# long_data <- mydata %>% pivot_longer(cols = c(PRE, MID, POST), names_to = "Timepoint", values_to = "Value")
# # Subset the data to only include VO2Max and VO2Peak
# vo2_data <- subset(long_data, Measure %in% c("VO2Max", "VO2Peak"))
# # Change the levels of the Timepoint factor to set the desired order
# vo2_data$Timepoint <- factor(vo2_data$Timepoint, levels = c("PRE", "MID", "POST"))

#   group_by(Measure, Timepoint) %>%
#   summarise(mean = mean(Value), sd = sd(Value), .groups = 'drop')

# y_axis_label <- expression(paste("VO"[2], " (", "ml" %*% kg^-1 %*% min^-1, ")"))

# sig_diff_vo2 <- c(F, T, T, F, F, F)
# 
# # consider a recode to use dots and lines!!!
# ####

# print(vo2_plot)
#

# long_data_T <- mydata_T %>% pivot_longer(cols = c(PRE, MID, POST), names_to = "Timepoint", values_to = "Value")
# # Subset the data to only include VO2Max and VO2Peak

# # Change the levels of the Timepoint factor to set the desired order

#   group_by(Measure, Timepoint) %>%

# # create a vector indicating which bars are significantly different
# sig_diff_vo2_U <- c(F, F, F, F, F, F)
# 
# # Pivot the data into long format
# long_data_U <- mydata_U %>% pivot_longer(cols = c(PRE, MID, POST), names_to = "Timepoint", values_to = "Value")
# # Subset the data to only include VO2Max and VO2Peak
# vo2_data_U <- subset(long_data_U, Measure %in% c("VO2Max", "VO2Peak"))
# # Change the levels of the Timepoint factor to set the desired order
# vo2_data_U$Timepoint <- factor(vo2_data_U$Timepoint, levels = c("PRE", "MID", "POST"))
# # Calculate the mean and standard deviation for each timepoint and measure combination
# vo2_summary_U <- vo2_data_U %>%
#   group_by(Measure, Timepoint) %>%
#   summarise(mean = mean(Value), sd = sd(Value), .groups = 'drop')
# # Create the plot sig diff
# vo2_U_plot <-
#   ggplot(vo2_summary_U, aes(x = Timepoint, y = mean, fill = Measure)) +
#   geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - sd, ymax = mean + sd), width = 0.2, position = position_dodge(0.9)) +
#   geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
#   geom_text(aes(y = mean + sd + 1, label = ifelse(sig_diff_vo2_U, "*", "")),
#             position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), size = 10) +
#   labs(x = "", y = y_axis_label, fill = "") +
#   scale_fill_manual(values = c(dark_blue_color, light_blue_color)) +
#     scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 60),
#                      breaks = seq(0, 50, 10),
#                      minor_breaks = seq(0, 50, 10),
#                      expand = c(0, 0)) +
#   theme_pubr() +
#   theme(legend.position = c(0.1, 0.9),
#         panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
#         panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
#         panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
#         plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
#         panel.border = element_blank())
# 
# # Label for the first plot
# label1 <- "Trained"
# # Label for the second plot
# label2 <- "Untrained"
# # Arrange plots and label them
# vo2_combined_plot <-
#   ggarrange(vo2_T_plot, vo2_U_plot, ncol = 2, common.legend = TRUE, legend = "right",
#             labels = c(label1, label2))
# print(vo2_combined_plot)
# file_name_plot <- paste0(output_directory, "/", date,"__combined_color_vo2_plot.png")
# ggsave(file_name_plot, plot = vo2_combined_plot, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 1200)
# 
# 
# 




# Combine overall, trained, and untrained data into a single long format
long_data_combined <- bind_rows(
  # Overall data (all participants)
  mydata %>% 
    pivot_longer(cols = c(PRE, MID, POST), names_to = "Timepoint", values_to = "Value") %>%
    filter(Measure %in% measures) %>%
    mutate(TrainingStatus = "Overall"),
  # Trained participants
  mydata_T %>% 
    pivot_longer(cols = c(PRE, MID, POST), names_to = "Timepoint", values_to = "Value") %>%
    mutate(TrainingStatus = "Trained"),
  # Untrained participants
  mydata_U %>% 
    pivot_longer(cols = c(PRE, MID, POST), names_to = "Timepoint", values_to = "Value") %>%
    mutate(TrainingStatus = "Untrained")
)

# Subset the data to only include VO2Max and VO2Peak
vo2_data_combined <- subset(long_data_combined, Measure %in% c("VO2Max", "VO2Peak"))

# Set factor levels for proper ordering (Overall first, then Untrained, then Trained)
vo2_data_combined$Timepoint <- factor(vo2_data_combined$Timepoint, levels = c("PRE", "MID", "POST"))
vo2_data_combined$TrainingStatus <- factor(vo2_data_combined$TrainingStatus, 
                                          levels = c("Overall", "Untrained", "Trained"))

# Calculate summary statistics
vo2_summary_combined <- vo2_data_combined %>%
  group_by(Measure, Timepoint, TrainingStatus) %>%
  summarise(mean = mean(Value), sd = sd(Value), .groups = 'drop')

# Create significance indicators based on your original vectors
# Overall: sig_diff_vo2 <- c(F, T, T, F, F, F) (VO2Max MID & POST significant)
# Trained: sig_diff_vo2_T <- c(F, T, T, F, F, F) (VO2Max MID & POST significant)  
# Untrained: sig_diff_vo2_U <- c(F, F, F, F, F, F) (no significance)
vo2_summary_combined <- vo2_summary_combined %>%
  mutate(
    significant = case_when(
      # Overall group: VO2Max shows significance at MID and POST
      TrainingStatus == "Overall" & Measure == "VO2Max" & Timepoint %in% c("MID", "POST") ~ TRUE,
      # Trained group: VO2Max shows significance at MID and POST
      TrainingStatus == "Trained" & Measure == "VO2Max" & Timepoint %in% c("MID", "POST") ~ TRUE,
      # Untrained group: no significance
      TrainingStatus == "Untrained" ~ FALSE,
      # All other cases
      TRUE ~ FALSE
    )
  )
# Create the faceted plot with three panels
vo2_faceted_plot <- ggplot(vo2_summary_combined, aes(x = Timepoint, y = mean, fill = Measure)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - sd, ymax = mean + sd), 
                width = 0.2, position = position_dodge(0.9)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(y = mean + sd + 1, label = ifelse(significant, "*", "")),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), size = 6) +
  facet_wrap(~ TrainingStatus, ncol = 3) +  # Three columns for three panels
  labs(x = "", y = y_axis_label, fill = "") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(dark_blue_color, light_blue_color)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 60),
                     breaks = seq(0, 50, 10),
                     expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme_pubr() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",  # Keep legend at bottom
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "black"),  # Clean facet labels
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12)  # Bold facet labels
  )
print(vo2_faceted_plot)

# Save the plot (adjust width for three panels)
file_name_plot <- paste0(output_directory, "/", date, "_faceted_vo2_plot_with_overall.png")
ggsave(file_name_plot, plot = vo2_faceted_plot, width = 12, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

# Other variables

```{r other variables, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE }
# Subset the data to only include body fat and weight
RE_data <- subset(long_data, Measure %in% c("6.5km*hr-1", "16km*hr-1", "12km*hr-1"))
# Change the levels of the Timepoint factor to set the desired order
RE_data$Timepoint <- factor(RE_data$Timepoint, levels = c("PRE", "MID", "POST"))
RE_data$Measure <- factor(RE_data$Measure, levels = c("6.5km*hr-1", "12km*hr-1", "16km*hr-1"))
# Calculate the mean and standard deviation for each timepoint and measure combination
RE_summary <- RE_data %>%
  group_by(Measure, Timepoint) %>%
  summarise(mean = mean(Value), sd = sd(Value), .groups = 'drop')
# Create the plot sig diff
RE_plot <-
  ggplot(RE_summary, aes(x = Timepoint, y = mean, fill = Measure)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - sd, ymax = mean + sd), width = 0.2, position = position_dodge(0.9)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  labs(x = "", y = y_axis_label, fill = "") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(dark_blue_color, light_blue_color, third_color)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 60), breaks = seq(0, 60, 10)) +  # Manual y-axis limits and tick marks
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = c(0.1, 0.9),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
        panel.border = element_blank())

# Save the plot to a png file at 1200 dpi
file_name_plot <- paste0(output_directory, "/", date, "_color_RE_plot.png")
ggsave(file_name_plot, plot = RE_plot, width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 1200)

# Create the plot sig diff

  labs(x = "", y = y_axis_label, fill = "") +

        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),

  group_by(Measure, Timepoint) %>%
  summarise(mean = mean(Value), sd = sd(Value), .groups = 'drop')
# Create the plot sig diff
RE_plot_U <-

  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 60), breaks = seq(0, 60, 10)) +  # Manual y-axis limits and tick marks

  theme(legend.position = c(0.1, 0.9),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),

# Subset the data to only include running economy
VJ_data <- subset(long_data, Measure %in% c("Vertical Jump"))

VJ_data$Timepoint <- factor(VJ_data$Timepoint, levels = c("PRE", "MID", "POST"))
# Calculate the mean and standard deviation for each timepoint and measure combination

        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),

# Subset the data to only include running economy
WM_data <- subset(long_data, Measure %in% c("Wmax"))
# Change the levels of the Timepoint factor to set the desired order
WM_data$Timepoint <- factor(WM_data$Timepoint, levels = c("PRE", "MID", "POST"))
# Calculate the mean and standard deviation for each timepoint and measure combination
WM_summary <- WM_data %>%
  group_by(Measure, Timepoint) %>%
  summarise(mean = mean(Value), sd = sd(Value), .groups = 'drop')
# Create the plot sig diff
WM_plot <-
  ggplot(WM_summary, aes(x = Timepoint, y = mean, fill = Measure)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - sd, ymax = mean + sd), width = 0.2, position = position_dodge(0.9)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  labs(x = "Maximum wattage during VO2 test", y = "Watts", fill = "") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(dark_blue_color, light_blue_color, third_color)) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
        panel.border = element_blank())

# Subset the data to only include running economy
WM_data_T <- subset(long_data_T, Measure %in% c("Wmax"))
# Change the levels of the Timepoint factor to set the desired order
WM_data_T$Timepoint <- factor(WM_data_T$Timepoint, levels = c("PRE", "MID", "POST"))
# Calculate the mean and standard deviation for each timepoint and measure combination
WM_summary_T <- WM_data_T %>%
  group_by(Measure, Timepoint) %>%
  summarise(mean = mean(Value), sd = sd(Value), .groups = 'drop')
# create a vector indicating which bars are significantly different
sig_diff_WM_T <- c(F, F, T)
# Create the plot sig diff
WM_plot_T <-
  ggplot(WM_summary_T, aes(x = Timepoint, y = mean, fill = Measure)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - sd, ymax = mean + sd), width = 0.2, position = position_dodge(0.9)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(y = mean + sd + 2, label = ifelse(sig_diff_WM_T, "*", "")),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), size = 10) +
  labs(x = "Trained", y = "Watts", fill = "") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(dark_blue_color, light_blue_color, third_color)) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
        panel.border = element_blank())

# Subset the data to only include running economy
WM_data_U <- subset(long_data_U, Measure %in% c("Wmax"))
# Change the levels of the Timepoint factor to set the desired order
WM_data_U$Timepoint <- factor(WM_data_U$Timepoint, levels = c("PRE", "MID", "POST"))
# Calculate the mean and standard deviation for each timepoint and measure combination
WM_summary_U <- WM_data_U %>%
  group_by(Measure, Timepoint) %>%
  summarise(mean = mean(Value), sd = sd(Value), .groups = 'drop')
# Create the plot sig diff
WM_plot_U <-
  ggplot(WM_summary_U, aes(x = Timepoint, y = mean, fill = Measure)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean, ymax = mean + sd), width = 0.2, position = position_dodge(0.9)) +
  labs(x = "Untrained", y = "Watts", fill = "") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(dark_blue_color, light_blue_color, third_color)) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
        panel.border = element_blank())

combined_plot_WM <- ggarrange(WM_plot, WM_plot_T, WM_plot_U, ncol = 3, common.legend = TRUE, legend = "right")
print(combined_plot_WM)

  group_by(Measure, Timepoint) %>%
  summarise(mean = mean(Value), sd = sd(Value), .groups = 'drop')

  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - sd, ymax = mean + sd), width = 0.2, position = position_dodge(0.9)) +

  ggplot(BC_summary_T, aes(x = Timepoint, y = mean, fill = Measure)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - sd, ymax = mean + sd), width = 0.2, position = position_dodge(0.9)) +

  scale_fill_manual(values = c(dark_blue_color, light_blue_color, third_color)) +

# Change the levels of the Timepoint factor to set the desired order
BC_data_U$Timepoint <- factor(BC_data_U$Timepoint, levels = c("PRE", "MID", "POST"))
# Calculate the mean and standard deviation for each timepoint and measure combination
BC_summary_U <- BC_data_U %>%
  group_by(Measure, Timepoint) %>%
  summarise(mean = mean(Value), sd = sd(Value), .groups = 'drop')
# Create the plot sig diff
BC_plot_U <-
  ggplot(BC_summary_U, aes(x = Timepoint, y = mean, fill = Measure)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - sd, ymax = mean + sd), width = 0.2, position = position_dodge(0.9)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  labs(x = "Untrained", y = "", fill = "") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(dark_blue_color, light_blue_color, third_color)) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 125), breaks = seq(0, 125, 25)) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = c(0.1, 0.9),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
        panel.border = element_blank())
```
